prompt: I want to understand the relationship between applicant income and loan approval. Show me approval rates broken down by income levels (buckets like <$50k, $50-100k, $100-200k, >$200k) for 2024.

assertions.name: sql_file_created
assertions.description: A query.sql file is created with valid SQL syntax

assertions.name: income_buckets_created
assertions.description: SQL creates income buckets (<50k, 50-100k, 100-200k, >200k) using CASE statements

assertions.name: approval_rate_calculated
assertions.description: Query calculates approval rate for each income bucket

assertions.name: results_show_trend
assertions.description: Results clearly show whether higher income correlates with higher approval rates

assertions.name: summary_report_exists
assertions.description: A summary.txt report is generated with key findings

assertions.name: report_highlights_correlation
assertions.description: Report identifies whether income affects approval rates and includes supporting numbers
